reviews.review_description: This is a beautiful, easy to pick up, difficult to master game. I love "Air Traffic Control" games. This not only scratches that itch, but it does it in 3D! How cool is that? Very. The answer is very :) And for the price it is a no brainer. Go for it!
cant play nothing work, if you men to wear vr helmet , it is unrwachable very low, underground

developer_response.body: Hello two.dots! We've updated the game to support controller interactions now and added extra guards so that the bug doesn't happen again. Let us know if this works for you!

reviews.review_description: Head over to my YouTube to check out my hands on video for this fun mixed reality game. A great way to show friends and family what MR can do. 4 modes over 3 difficulties with modifiers that can range from a relaxing experience to a spaceship guidance frenzy!

reviews.review_title: What an amazing use for Mixed Reality!
reviews.review_description: I've played a number of mixed reality games and, while they were good in their own ways, this game really show off the potential for mixed reality games. The mechanics are easy to learn, but the difficulty ramps up and soon, you'll be running around the playspace, navigating ships and addressing problems! I had a lot of fun with it, and I highly recommend it to anyone that wants a fun and immersive mixed reality experience.

I picked this up on a whim and am very happy with the decision.  Although this may not be the type of game you sink 10+ hours in, for a casual MR game it's well done and quite enjoyable to play.  I'm usually skeptical of current MR titles that require fairly precise gestures, but this game gets it right.  If you're really into VR/MR then this is the type of title you'll probably come back to time & again for short play sessions.  There's no real depth here, but the gameplay is really fun for 15-30 minutes at a time.  8% of men are color blind (I'm red/green) and initially I had difficulty distinguishing the 4 colors of the portals/ships but then I noted that the devs have also added a geometric "shape" corresponding to the color and that helped me immensely.  My only real suggestion for the devs is that they might still tweak the colors a bit to make them more distinguishable for the fairly large percentage of men (like me) who have deuteranomaly.

Such a clever way to turn simple controls and gameplay into an addictive experience! Even when using a Quest 2, I found the pinch controls responsive and satisfying. I even had some friends who have never worn a HMD play, and I watched them get sucked into guiding ships until I had to take the headset back. Highly recommend for anybody who wants to play something while their mind wanders off into space!

reviews.review_title: There needs to be more games like this!!
reviews.review_description: Games like this are exactly what mixed reality is missing! It is a great little game to throw on for a quick session to try to get a high score. It is a fun challenge that keeps you on your toes!

This game has obviously been made with a lot of care and thought from the models and effects to all of the different games modes. It starts off quite easy but will have you running around praying no ships crash into each other behind you as you attempt to streamline the ever growing chaos.

This is one of the best applications of mixed reality gaming I've seen. When I first played this title I was immediately hooked - the mechanics are near perfect, and it FEELS amazing to grab ships mid-air while they surround you. 100% worth a purchase, and with future updates it just gets better and better!

reviews.review_title: Very nice game with a free exercise!
reviews.review_description:
Nice litle game with endles fun, good price too.
I wish there where more distinct ships, slower and faster for example, or disapering lines to make it harder.
Many game modes too, wich you can turn in to a good exercise by placing the portals al over your room.

This game is an absolute joy to play ,  This MR game stars of slow and picks up pace quickly 
Using your room size to steer the craft to their goals becomes hectic as you avoid collisions and meteors 

Fun and Addictive gameplay 

Martin76x
Galactic Traffic Control feels like a game that is actually meant for MR! Also, I love hand tracking, it is just nice to play and for such a reasonable price. Looking forward to what comes next!!!

This is a fun, easy to learn  and hard to master MR experience. Great use of hands and controller tracking in addition, and I love the use of walls and surfaces that make the game feel a part of my space. LOVE IT!!!
All the charm and innovative simplicity of classic Flash games but for the latest hardware! And I wept as another brave ship was destroyed at the hands of my incompetent traffic controlling…
This game is amazing! Especially for the price. Very replayable and I like how the difficulty scales the further in the game you get. Amazing job to the developers that made this game.
Great game, so much fun to play and an incredible team of developers too!
